name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial offers secured and unsecured personal loans from $1,500–$30,000 at fixed rates of 11.99%–35.99% APR, with branch, phone, and online applications.
description_long:
OneMain Financial is one of the oldest consumer lending institutions in the United States, with over 100 years of operating history. The company operates a large network of physical branch locations across the country, including a Miami, FL branch at 8247 W Flagler St, and serves borrowers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans. Its long track record gives it brand recognition and operational stability that many fintech lenders lack.

OneMain offers both secured and unsecured personal loans ranging from $1,500 to $30,000, with repayment terms of 24 to 60 months and fixed APRs between 11.99% and 35.99%. Borrowers can apply online, by phone, or in person at a branch. The company also features a SpeedFunds option that allows approved borrowers to receive funds in as little as one hour after closing via an eligible bank-issued debit card. Loan uses include debt consolidation, medical bills, emergency expenses, home improvement, auto purchase and refinance, moving, weddings, vacations, and more.

What distinguishes OneMain is its emphasis on human, in-person service through its branch network. Loan specialists are available for one-on-one consultations, and after-hours appointments are offered to accommodate working borrowers. Prequalification is available online without a hard credit pull. All loans carry fixed rates and fixed monthly payments with no prepayment penalties, making budgeting predictable. The company explicitly targets borrowers with less-than-perfect credit who need a relationship-based lending experience.

Honestly, OneMain's APR ceiling of 35.99% is high — borrowers with stronger credit profiles will likely find cheaper options at banks or credit unions. The loan maximum of $30,000 is also lower than many competitors. However, for consumers with limited credit histories or prior credit challenges who need a midsize installment loan and value face-to-face support, OneMain is a legitimate and long-established option worth considering. Borrowers should compare total loan cost carefully before signing.
address: 6600 Franklin Ave Ste A9, New Orleans, LA 70122

company_info.headquarters: 6600 Franklin Ave Ste A9, New Orleans, LA 70122

pros: Over 100 years in business — one of the most established non-bank personal lenders
Prequalification available online with no hard credit pull
SpeedFunds delivers money in as little as 1 hour after closing via debit card
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments — no surprise payment changes
No prepayment fees on any loan
Both secured and unsecured loan options available ($1,500–$30,000)
After-hours branch appointments available for working borrowers
cons: Maximum APR of 35.99% is near the top of the market for personal loans
Loan maximum of $30,000 is lower than many competitors offering up to $50,000+
Branch-centric model means closing often requires in-person or phone interaction, not fully digital
Requires proof of identity, residence, and income — documentation burden may be higher than online-only lenders
best_for: Borrowers with fair or poor credit who need $1,500–$30,000 and can't qualify at a bank
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance from a loan specialist
People needing fast funding — same-day via SpeedFunds after closing
Debt consolidation borrowers seeking fixed payments and no prepayment penalty
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers with fair or poor credit who need a midsize installment loan ($1,500–$30,000) and value the security of a century-old institution with in-person support. The main caveat is cost — APRs up to 35.99% mean borrowers with stronger credit should shop banks or credit unions first before committing.
services: SpeedFunds same-day disbursement via debit card
In-branch and after-hours loan specialist appointments
